Description:
The official MCP (Model Context Protocol) C# SDK v1.0 is here—and it’s a game changer for building AI-powered applications in .NET. In this session, we’ll break down what MCP is, why it matters, and how this new SDK unlocks powerful scenarios to connect your apps with AI models using a standardized protocol.

Join us as we explore real-world use cases, walk through code samples, and show how you can integrate MCP into your .NET solutions to build more intelligent, extensible, and future-ready applications. Whether you're just getting started or already building with AI, this session will give you practical insights to level up your AI + .NET game 💪

🔗 Links: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/collections/d4gkh1tm1x53m7?source=docs

🎙️ Featuring: Bruno Capuano (https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/advocates/bruno-capuano), Mike Kistler (https://www.linkedin.com/in/michael-kistler/)

#dotnet #AI #MCP #ModelContextProtocol #CSharp
Author: dotnet
Title: NET AI Community Standup - MCP C# SDK v1.0 is Here!
